subcodes.first_line: God hath willed thine exodus from the Land of Mystery, lest thou shouldst hear the Great Terror in those days when the ungodly seized control [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و قد اراد الله خروجک من ارض السر لئلا تسمع فزع الاکبر فی ایام التی اخذ المشرکون
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
